media.title: Predicting the NBA’s notable player options, team options and non-guarantees
media.description: Get accustomed to the phrase “decline and re-sign," because you’re going to be hearing it a lot as teams look to manage their salary caps.

items.title: The Brooklyn Nets will decline their $6.25 million team option on Ziaire Williams, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old forward averaged 10.2 points in 56 games played for Brooklyn last season. Williams will become an unrestricted free agent.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Brooklyn Nets will decline their $6.25 million team option on Ziaire Williams, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old forward averaged 10.2 points in 56 games played for Brooklyn last season. Williams will become an unrestricted free agent.
